description_long: This is a simple, utilitarian metal fence composed of a series of vertical posts connected by two parallel horizontal rails. The fence features a linear, segmented design with each section joined at slight angles, creating a zigzag pattern along its length. The top and bottom rails run continuously, while the vertical posts are evenly spaced and extend slightly above the top rail. The structure is minimalistic, with no decorative elements or embellishments, and the surface appears to be coated in a dark, matte finish, likely for weather resistance. The fence is relatively low in height, suitable for demarcating boundaries or guiding pedestrian flow in urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or parking lots. The overall construction suggests durability and ease of installation, with a focus on function over form.
description: A simple, dark metal fence with two horizontal rails and evenly spaced vertical posts, forming a segmented zigzag pattern. The design is minimalistic and utilitarian, with no decorative features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full zigzag pattern, two horizontal rails, and all vertical posts.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the thin profile of the fence, with rails and posts aligned in a narrow line.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the segmented structure and all posts and rails.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and alignment of the rails and posts.
